texto: Prior to her reading of the poem, light tears washed over him. He seemed to be leaking out moments that were, as far as he could tell, stored in physical parts of his body – in his shoulders, his back, his stomach. His body remembered things that his brain ignored.
explicacao: Orientação direta de U.L. Harper sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Prior to her reading of the poem, light tears washed over him. He seemed to be leaking out moment…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, contemporary, drama, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e drama.
